title: Implement metabolism drain over time
rationale: Without caloric drain, the simulation has no urgency. This spec wires satiation decay into the BrainSystem so entities seek food autonomously.

preconditions: BrainSystem must already be registered in SimulationBootstrapper

deliverables.description: Add satiation drain tick, clamp to [0,100]
Assert satiation decreases after N ticks

acceptanceTests.assertion: Satiation decreases by at least 1 point after 100 ticks at default time scale

nonGoals: Do not implement hydration drain — that is WP-05
Do not modify the UI layer
